en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO SHUSHAN EDUTH. A MIKTAM OF DAVID; FOR INSTRUCTION; WHEN HE STROVE WITH ARAM-NAHARAIM AND WITH ARAM-ZOBAH, AND WHEN JOAB ON HIS RETURN STRUCK DOWN TWELVE THOUSAND OF EDOM IN THE VALLEY OF SALT. O God, you have rejected us, broken our defenses; you have been angry; oh, restore us.
zh: 神啊！你丟棄了我們，擊碎了我們； 你曾向我們發怒，現在求你復興我們。

en: You have made the land to quake; you have torn it open; repair its breaches, for it totters.
zh: 你使地震動、崩裂， 求你修補裂縫， 因為地正在搖動。

en: You have made your people see hard things; you have given us wine to drink that made us stagger.
zh: 你使你的子民遇見艱苦； 你使我們喝那令人東倒西歪的酒。

en: You have set up a banner for those who fear you, that they may flee to it from the bow. Selah
zh: 你為敬畏你的人，豎起旗幟， 使他們可以逃到那裡，躲避敵人的弓箭。 。

en: That your beloved ones may be delivered, give salvation by your right hand and answer us!
zh: 求你用右手拯救我們，應允我們， 好使你所喜愛的人得拯救。

en: God has spoken in his holiness: "With exultation I will divide up Shechem and portion out the Vale of Succoth.
zh: 神在自己的聖所 說： “我必誇勝， 我必分開示劍， 我必量度疏割谷。

en: Gilead is mine; Manasseh is mine; Ephraim is my helmet; Judah is my scepter.
zh: 基列是我的，瑪拿西是我的； 以法蓮是我的頭盔； 猶大是我的權杖。

en: Moab is my washbasin; upon Edom I cast my shoe; over Philistia I shout in triumph."
zh: 摩押是我的洗腳盆； 我要向以東拋鞋； 我要因戰勝非利士歡呼 。”

en: Who will bring me to the fortified city? Who will lead me to Edom?
zh: 誰能帶我進堅固城？ 誰能領我到以東地去呢？

en: Have you not rejected us, O God? You do not go forth, O God, with our armies.
zh: 神啊！你不是把我們丟棄了嗎？ 神啊！你不和我們的軍隊一同出戰嗎？

en: Oh, grant us help against the foe, for vain is the salvation of man!
zh: 求你幫助我們抵擋敵人， 因為人的援助是沒有用的。

en: With God we shall do valiantly; it is he who will tread down our foes.
zh: 我們靠著 神奮勇作戰， 因為他必踐踏我們的敵人。
